homePage.createSolarPanel: Create Solar Proposals in Seconds with Our Solar Design Software
homePage.description: Transform your solar sales process with an advanced <bold>AI-driven tool</bold> that generates accurate, instant proposals helping you <bold>close more deals.</bold>

homePage.automateYourSolar: Automate Your Solar Quotes and Proposals with Our AI-Powered Software
homePage.makeStunningSolarProposals: Make Stunning Solar Proposals in Seconds
homePage.makeStunningSolarProposalsDescription1: With our solar proposal software, your sales team can build polished, accurate offers in minutes, not hours. AI takes care of the heavy lifting like:
homePage.makeStunningSolarProposalsDescription2: and more so your reps just click, tweak, and send.
homePage.boostConversionsWithInstantQuotesDescrip: Capture a lead, generate an instant quote, and keep the momentum going — no back-and-forth emails, no waiting. Faster responses mean more closed deals and a higher conversion rate for your solar business.

homePage.whatOurCustomerAreSayingAboutOurSolarSal: What Our Customer Are Saying About Our Solar Sales Software
homePage.whatMakesUsUniqueDescription: We combine deep industry knowledge with cutting-edge AI to deliver a tool that truly understands and solves real solar sales challenges. Here's what sets us apart from the rest:
homePage.unique1Text: Years of hands-on experience in solar design and installation shape our tech. We speak kilowatts, pitch angles, and PV optimization fluently.
homePage.unique2Text: We’ve worked side-by-side with solar sales teams. We know the bottlenecks, the follow-up stress, and the race to send polished proposals fast.
homePage.unique3Text: Most tools still need human tweaking. Ours doesn’t. From roof to layout, every panel is placed by AI in the most efficient way - no guessing, no dragging, just results.
homePage.unique4Title: Smarter AI Trained on Real AutoCAD Blueprints
homePage.unique4Text: Our AI is trained on tens of thousands of real CAD project files, giving it engineer-level insight into roof layouts, shading, and solar constraints - mirroring the vision of a real solar engineer.
homePage.unique4AiText: Powered by our <bold>Patent-Pending</bold>, in-house AI engine. SolarGenix sets a new industry standard for smarter, faster, precise and more reliable solar solutions.
homePage.statisyicLabel2: Solar leads captured and instant quotes sent
homePage.seeWhatYourProposalWillLookLike: See What Your Proposal Will Look Like
homePage.seeWhatYourProposalWillLookLikeDescripti: All the insights, calculations and design decisions come together in a clean, modern proposal that’s built to win trust. Designed for clarity and visual appeal, each solar sales proposal makes it easy for homeowners to understand their system, savings and investment.
homePage.seeWhatYourProposalWillLookLikePoint3: Clear breakdown of savings, system details & ROI
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftware: Why Solar Teams Love Our Sales Software
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareTitle1: Send Proposals While the Lead Is Still Warm
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareDescrip: No more waiting hours or days to send a quote. Your team can go from roof scan to final proposal in minutes. That means you reply while the customer is still excited, which makes it much easier to win the job.
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareTitle2: Accurate Designs Your Team Can Trust
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareDescrip: AI-powered roof detection, shading checks, and panel layout give your team solid numbers to work with. They can walk homeowners through system size, savings, and payback with confidence, without doing everything in spreadsheets.
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareTitle3: Cut the Busywork Out of Solar Sales
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareDescrip: Your reps shouldn’t be stuck redrawing systems or editing PDFs all day. With automated designs and ready-made proposal templates, they create once, adjust quickly, and send. Less admin time means more calls, more follow-ups, and more closed projects.

New team members can pick it up quickly, and experienced reps get the depth they need. Everyone follows the same process, uses the same proposal format, and sees the same data, which keeps your sales and ops teams on the same page.
homePage.faqSubtitle: Optimize your solar design workflow with our AI-powered tools. Create accurate quotes and proposals in seconds, save time, and improve efficiency.
homePage.bottomCallToActionTitle: Sell Solar Faster, Smarter, Better with SolarGenix

productDescription.title: Our Product: AI That Sells Solar - Faster, Smarter, Better
productDescription.description: SolarGenix.ai is a fully automated, AI-powered platform built to make solar sales faster, smarter, and more effective. It eliminates the slow, manual steps in proposal creation-helping teams move from lead to proposal in minutes, not hours.

roofDetection.title: AI-Driven Roof Detection
roofDetection.subtitle: Understand Every Residential Roof - Automatically
roofDetection.description: Our AI-powered roof detection is built exclusively for residential solar. It analyzes aerial imagery to instantly model the roof’s shape, slope, and structure - no site visit, no manual sketching.

list.option_1: Auto-detect roof dimensions for any home
list.option_2: Analyze pitch and orientation for sun-facing accuracy
list.option_3: Identify obstacles like chimneys, pipes, etc.

roofDetection.imgText: With precise rooftop modeling handled by AI, your proposal starts with a foundation of speed, accuracy, and zero manual effort.

shadingAnalysis.title: AI-Powered Shading Analysis
shadingAnalysis.subtitle: Shadow-Smart Insights for Every Home
shadingAnalysis.description: Shade matters - and our AI makes sure it doesn’t cost your customers energy. Using sun-path modeling and visual data, the system simulates how shadows affect a roof throughout the day and across seasons.

list.option_1: Dynamic shading maps based on real-world sun movement
list.option_2: Obstacle detection from trees, neighboring homes, and roof features
list.option_3: Exposure scoring to find high-performance panel zones

shadingAnalysis.imgText: This shading intelligence ensures panels are placed where they’ll perform best, maximizing output and customer satisfaction.

financialForecasting.title: Intelligent Financial Forecasting
financialForecasting.subtitle: Homeowners Want Clarity - Our AI Delivers It
financialForecasting.description: No spreadsheets, no guesswork. Our AI builds clear, compelling financial forecasts tailored to each home and utility rate. Every proposal includes a personalized savings story backed by real numbers.

list.option_1: Customized savings estimates using local energy rates
list.option_2: ROI and payback period based on homeowner usage
list.option_3: Local incentives and rebates applied automatically

financialForecasting.imgText: Homeowners see exactly what they’ll save and when it pays off—building trust and helping close deals faster.

panelPlacement.title: AI-Optimized Panel Placement
panelPlacement.subtitle: Smarter Layouts, Maximum Output - No Effort
panelPlacement.description: Designing layouts is a thing of the past. Our AI instantly places panels on each roof in the most effective pattern for sunlight, spacing, and aesthetic fit.

list.option_1: Fully automated panel positioning with no manual input
list.option_2: Avoids shaded or inefficient areas with data-backed logic
list.option_3: Maximizes production per roof with precision spacing

panelPlacement.imgText: This final step connects all the data - roof layout, shading, and performance prediction to deliver a smart, sales-ready design without touching a layout tool.

proposalGeneration.title: Stylish, Sales-Ready Proposal Generation
proposalGeneration.subtitle: Beautiful Proposals That Speak Clearly
proposalGeneration.description: All the insights, calculations, and design decisions come together in a clean, modern proposal that’s built to win trust. Designed for clarity and visual appeal, each proposal makes it easy for homeowners to understand their system, savings, and investment.

list.option_3: Clear breakdown of savings, system details & ROI

proposalGeneration.imgText: It's more than just data - it’s a tool to win trust and drive action. Send proposals that not only inform, but convert.

muchMoreToCome.title: And much more to come
muchMoreToCome.description: Create high-converting, AI-powered proposals in seconds. Sign up now and get 5 proposals free!
